PROPOUNDING PARTY: Plaintiff Jane Henderson
RESPONDING PARTY: Defendant Acme Corporation
SET NUMBER: One

SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES

DEFINITIONS

As used herein, the term DOCUMENT refers to any writing as defined in Evidence Code Section 250. The term YOU refers to Defendant Acme Corporation, its officers, directors, employees, agents, and representatives. The term INCIDENT refers to the termination of Plaintiff's employment on or about June 15, 2025.

INSTRUCTIONS

In answering these interrogatories, furnish all information available to you, including information in the possession of your attorneys, investigators, employees, agents, and others acting on your behalf.

SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 1:
State all facts supporting YOUR decision to terminate Plaintiff's employment.

SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 2:
Identify ALL DOCUMENTS relating to any performance reviews or evaluations of Plaintiff during her employment with YOU.

SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 3:
State the names, addresses, and telephone numbers of ALL persons who participated in or witnessed the decision to terminate Plaintiff's employment.

SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 4:
For EACH complaint of discrimination or harassment made by Plaintiff during her employment, state the date of the complaint, the person to whom the complaint was made, and the substance of the complaint.

SPECIAL INTERROGATORY NO. 5:
State ALL facts supporting YOUR contention that Plaintiff's termination was for legitimate, non-discriminatory reasons.

PROOF OF SERVICE

I hereby certify that on this date a copy of the foregoing was served on all parties.
